causalAutopsy.notes: Not a bug fix — a structural self-improvement Justin directed after the 2026-06-06 holistic assessment found the program mentor-heavy/mentee-light (13 echo-to-codey cycles vs 3 codey-to-gemini). The existing roleCoverage knew the keystone axis was under-firing but nothing surfaced it; this makes the imbalance a queryable fact ('Observation Needs Structure' applied to layer balance). Observe-only first, enforcement/cadence deferred to phase-2.
